Simpel bagebudding med gylden karamel
Lad os nu dykke ned i køkkenet og afdække hemmelighederne bag at lave din egen uimodståelige bagebudding med gylden karamel:
Ingredienser:
Til buddingen:
4 kopper daggammelt brød, skåret i tern
2 kopper sødmælk
1/2 kop piskefløde
3 store æg
1/2 kop sukker
1 tsk vaniljeekstrakt
Fuld opskrift i kommentarfeltet

items.text:
Vi fjerner inaktive medlemmer fra gruppen, sig hvad som helst for at forblive aktiv.
Oksekød og sovs over kartoffelmos
Ingredienser:
Til kartoffelmosen:
4-5 russet kartofler, skrællede og skåret i tern
2 spsk smør
1/2 kop mælk (mere om nødvendigt)
Salt og sort peber efter smag
Til hakket oksekød og sovs:
450 g magert hakket oksekød
1 løg, hakket
Opskriften er først (c.o.m.m.e.n.t). ...

sharedPost.text:
🚨 Ostatni moment aby się zgłosić!

UWAGA! Ogólnopolski Konkurs Wokalny - edycja wakacyjna! ❤️

⭐️ Złap oddech. Daj się ponieść głosowi. Bo każdy głos zaczyna się od oddechu! 🎤
Zapraszamy solistów, duety i zespoły z całej Polski do udziału w wyjątkowym konkursie wokalnym, w którym pracujemy nad tym, co w śpiewie najważniejsze — świadomym oddechem i swobodnym prowadzeniem dźwięku.

⭐️Pokaż, jak Twój głos potrafi brzmieć, gdy daje mu się przestrzeń. Nie liczy się wiek — liczy się pasja i chęć rozwoju.
Dołącz do nas i pozwól swojemu głosowi naprawdę wybrzmieć.

🏅Na każdego uczestnika i wyróżnionego czeka dyplom udziału, a na laureatów i statuetki! ⭐️

link do regulaminu: https://www.laboratoriumdzwiekow.pl/.../konkurs.../regulamin

link do karty zgłoszenia: https://www.laboratoriumdzwiekow.pl/.../formularz-zgloszenia

sharedPost.text:
🎥 In diesem Reel spricht Ulrike Kuner über Nachhaltigkeit in Kunst und Kultur. 

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 172. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 21.07.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

💬 Plaudermeeting: Wert und Wirkung – der Nutzen meiner Kunst 
🎙️ Moderation: Andreas Huber 

Welche Wirkung hat meine künstlerische Arbeit auf Publikum, Gesellschaft oder Auftraggeber*innen? Wie lässt sich ihr Wert vermitteln – auch jenseits des Monetären? Und wie kann ich den Nutzen meiner Kunst so kommunizieren, dass er für andere greifbar und nachvollziehbar wird? 

In diesem interaktiven Plaudermeeting tauschen wir Erfahrungen, Perspektiven und praktische Ansätze aus. Gemeinsam erarbeiten wir, wie wir unsere künstlerische Arbeit selbstbewusst nach außen vertreten, unsere Außenwirkung gezielt gestalten und mit einem klaren Verständnis des eigenen Wertes in Gespräche, Projekte und Verhandlungen gehen können. 

Ein Frühstück für alle, die ihre künstlerische Position schärfen, sich inspirieren lassen und sich mit Kolleg*innen vernetzen möchten. 

© Alexandr Ivanov 

📲 Mehr Infos: 
Website: www.KünstlerBusinessFrühstück.at  
Facebook: https://fb.me/e/9GwVTnc5y 
 

#Kultur #Kunst #Künstlerinnen #Kreativität #Kunstschaffen #BusinessFrühstück #Selbstmarketing #Kulturmanagement #Netzwerken #Wien #Innovation

items.text:
**KRAKÓW - ŚPIEWAJĄCY AKTORZY POSZUKIWANI - ZLECENIE DOBRZE PŁATNE - NOWA DATA **

**Wszystkie osoby, które już wysłały mi swoje zgłoszenie i są dostępne w nowym terminie - uprzejmie proszę o podbicie mi maila i potwierdzenie dostępności!**

Do spotu reklamowego dla producenta słodyczy poszukuję:

**- 2 kobiety młodsze (35-45 lat) // do 2 scen**

aktorki/ grający naturszczycy z doświadczeniem, naturalne, ciepła energia, nie idealnie piękne / modelowe, spontaniczne, możliwe podobieństwo fizyczne (siostry / kuzynki)

- **mężczyzna (45-55 lat) // do 1 sceny**

aktor/ grający naturszczyk z doświadczeniem, naturalny i autentyczny, nie idealnie piękny / modelowy. Figura - lekko „zasiedziany home office”

- **dzieci:** **dziewczynka (około 7 lat) i chłopiec (około 10 lat) //** **do 1 sceny **

grające - z doświadczeniem przed kamerą, naturalne, autentyczne, radosne i żywiołowe, potrafiące amatorsko tańczyć, możliwe podobieństwo fizyczne (rodzeństwo / kuzyni)

- **3 kobiety starsze (około 50 lat) //** **do 1 sceny **

aktorki/ grający naturszczycy z doświadczeniem, naturalne i autentyczne, bardzo pozytywne, nieskrępowane, żywiołowe, wyraźnie różniące się typem figury i urody, nie idealnie piękne / modelowe

- **babcia (około 70 lat) //** **do 1 sceny **

aktorki/ grający naturszczycy z doświadczeniem, miejska fajna babcia, z luzem i naturalnością, otwarta i z auto dystansem 

**Wymagana umiejętność u wszystkich – śpiew aktorski / dobry śpiew amatorski i doświadczenie przed kamerą!**

Role epizodyczne nie mówione ale śpiewane, na dalszym etapie castingu wybrane osoby poproszę o nagranie wskazanej piosenki. 

**Prawa na 5 lat bez ograniczeń terytorialnych, pola eksploatacji TV, internet, kino, radio, outdoor, POS. **

**Zdjęcia 10 sierpnia 2026 w Krakowie (okolicach)**. 

Nie zapewniamy noclegu, ewentualnie zwrot kosztów dojazdu (paliwa, bilety na pociąg).

Zgłoszenia wraz ze zdjęciami, wideo wizytówką i danymi do kontaktu proszę przesyłać na adres: ***castingotwarty@gmail.com ***w tytule proszę o wpisanie roli, do której się zgłaszacie. 

Nie przyjmuję zaproszeń do znajomych, nie wchodzę w 

konwersacje pod postem i na priv - skontaktuję się z wybranymi osobami.

Dziękuję :)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people and people smiling

items.text:
# **HLEDÁME HERCE/NEHERCE DO REKLAMNÍ RODINKY**
**AUDIOVIZUÁLNÍ PREZENTAČNÍ SPOT PRO REALITNÍHO MAKLÉŘE**

Jedná se o natáčení propagačního spotu pro realitního makléře. Natáčení bude probíhat celý den **17. 7. 2026 v Praze**. Role jsou **honorované**.

**Sháníme členy rodiny:**
* **Maminka (40-50 let)**
* **Tatínek (40-50 let)**
* **Dcera - roztomilá holčička (5-8 let)**
* **Syn - teenager (14-18 let)**
* **Babička - (60+)**
* **Pejsek **

*Rodina se schází v obývacím pokoji, kde maminka začíná pociťovat úzkost z nedostatku prostoru. Tatínek se synem sledují v televizi sportovní přenos, zatímco do malého obýváku přichází babička s vnučkou a pejskem. Místnost se rychle zaplní a během chvíle v ní zavládne typický rodinný chaos.*

Herecké výkony nejsou náročné, bez dialogu. Preferujeme herce, přijímáme i neherce.

topComments.text: Im intrested im 49 at the end of the month.Pm

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.

Wysyłając zgłoszenie wyrażają Państwo dobrowolna zgodę na przetwarzanie Danych Osobowych, RODO dla PROFESJA TV

Pozdrawiamy!

items.text:
Hej! 

Zapraszam na wyjątkowy casting, szukamy osób, które nie grają w reklamach, nie występują. Mile widziani naturszczycy, osoby z kół teatralnych, ale też Wasi znajomi, dziadkowie, przyjaciele. Reklama dla operatora gier liczbowych.

Nie trzeba mieć zdolności aktorskich ani doświadczenia. 

Role są mówione. Na zasadzie luźnej rozmowy, a nie konkretnego tekstu do wyuczenia, więc zadanie jest ułatwione, nie trzeba się przejmować.

**SZUKAMY: **
1. **GŁÓWNY BOHATER KRZYSIEK- wiek 30-35 lat - bardzo zależy nam na panu z brzuszkiem.**
2. **GŁÓWNY BOHATER TOMEK -  wiek 35-40 lat - wiarygodny w roli managera **
3. **GŁÓWNY BOHATER PAN STANISŁAW - starszy pan w wieku 70-78 lat **
4. **GŁÓWNA BOHATERKA EWA - wiek 45-50 lat - kobieta z klasą, dama **

**TERMINY: **

**23.07 - termin wysyłania zgłoszeń do godziny 18:00**

20-24.07 / 27.07.2026 (TBC - finalnie 1 dzień) - recall  w Warszawie- czyli ostataczeny etap castingu 

30-31.07.2026 (1 dzień dla aktora) - przymiarki w Warszawie (powyżej 3 h) 

2/3/4/5/6/7.08.2026 (Ilość dni dla aktora TBC) - ZDJĘCIA (W Warszawie i okolice)

**PRAWA I STAWKI:**

Rola główna - 6000 zł prawa + 1500 zł dzień zdjęciowy 

***Zainteresowane osoby zapraszam do kontaktu mejlowego: ***slavic.squad.cast@gmail.com*** , temat WYJĄTKOWY CASTING, w zgłoszeniu informacje:***

1. ***Imię i nazwisko***
2. ***Wiek***
3. ***Telefon kontaktowy***
4. ***Do której roli się zgłaszasz ***
5. ***Czy jesteś naturszczykiem? (Nie masz doświadczenia w  filmach i TV) ***
6. ***2 aktualne zdjęcia***

***WYBRANE OSOBY ZOSTANĄ POPROSZONE O DOSŁANIE MATERIAŁU VIDEO.***

20-24.07 / 27.07.2026 (TBC - finalnie 1 dzień) - recall  w Warszawie- czyli ostataczeny etap castingu 

30-31.07.2026 (1 dzień dla aktora) - przymiarki w Warszawie (powyżej 3 h) 

2/3/4/5/6/7.08.2026 (Ilość dni dla aktora TBC) - ZDJĘCIA (W Warszawie i okolice)

**PRAWA I STAWKI:**

Rola główna - 6000 zł prawa + 1500 zł dzień zdjęciowy 

***Zainteresowane osoby zapraszam do kontaktu mejlowego: ***slavic.squad.cast@gmail.com*** , temat WYJĄTKOWY CASTING, w zgłoszeniu informacje:***

1. ***Imię i nazwisko***
2. ***Wiek***
3. ***Telefon kontaktowy***
4. ***Do której roli się zgłaszasz ***
5. ***Czy jesteś naturszczykiem? (Nie masz doświadczenia w  filmach i TV) ***
6. ***2 aktualne zdjęcia***

***WYBRANE OSOBY ZOSTANĄ POPROSZONE O DOSŁANIE MATERIAŁU VIDEO.***

items.text:
**Are you ready to take your acting career to the next level?**

Scene 2 Screen Acting based in South Manchester and ran by Actor Andrew Ellis (This is England, The Walk-In, This is Going to Hurt) are celebrating our first birthday!

Over the past 12 months we have had 200+ actors through our doors, working together, learning new skills and sharpening existing skillsets. 

Best of all Andrew has a huge emphasis on practical learning and filming, meaning you come away each block with 2 showreel style scenes that are yours to keep! 

Our classes are based in the amazing Creative Space above Wythenshawe library, with a huge free carpark and great public transport links (we might be the only acting class you can fly too, should you want that is) also… We have air conditioning… which sounds nice right about now. 

Classes cost just £85 for a block of 4 two hour sessions. 

Drop us an email on: [Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com](mailto:Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com) 

To enquire. 

Time to take your acting to the next level!

items.text:
Hey guys- I’m new here 

Please allow me to introduce myself - my name is mariah lacey Lila https://app.spotlight.com/5094-1207-2084

Mariah lacey has a natural ability to portray powerful women navigating leadership, loyalty and moral conflict.

Mariah Lacey is a London-based actor with a natural ability to portray emotionally complex women whose strength, intelligence and vulnerability exist side by side. She brings grounded authority, emotional depth and authenticity to every performance, and her work lends itself to period drama, fantasy, historical drama, psychological thrillers and contemporary character-driven stories.

Recent theatre credits include Kate in How to Date a Feminist at the New Wimbledon Theatre and Nurse and Benvolio in Romeo and Juliet with Bowler Crab Theatre Company, following the company's five-star recognition at the Shakespeare Festival. Alongside her performance work, Mariah is the founder of the emerging theatre company Outcasts and is currently developing its debut production.
Mariah has been recalled by reputable Casting Directors, including Jeremy Zimmerman, Nick Young theatre Director- Trained with RSC Company, and Karmel Chocrane she has received consistent positive feedback on her work.
Alongside her screen and stage work, she is trained in Shakespeare, stage combat, immersive theatre and voice acting, enabling her to move confidently between historical, fantasy and contemporary worlds.

items.text:
Most directors won't direct you.

I learned this the hard way on EastEnders. You turn up, you do the scene, the director says "fine," and you move on. Then you watch it back and realise you didn't make a single interesting choice. You were just saying the words.

Sam Neill figured this out decades ago. 150+ credits across four decades — Jurassic Park, Peaky Blinders, The Piano — and his secret wasn't luck or connections. It was one principle: arrive ready.

He didn't wait for the director to tell him what his motivation was. He'd already decided everything. Character history. Scene-by-scene objectives. Exactly where the voice sits and how the body moves. Not out of arrogance — but because he knew the director might be exhausted, behind schedule, and quietly hoping the actor would solve the problem for them.

Some actors prepare like they're packing a case on the morning of a flight — throwing things in, hoping it's enough. Neill prepared like he was moving house. Everything is boxed, labelled, and loaded days in advance.

The counterintuitive bit? All that preparation doesn't make you rigid. It sets you free to actually listen and react truthfully in the moment.

In this week's video, I break down the exact Sam Neill preparation method — including three exercises you can do at home before your next audition or self-tape. If you've ever walked off set feeling like you left something on the table, this one's for you.

As ususal the link to the lesson is in the comments.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'ΤΗΕ METHOD THE METHOD STANISLAVSKI RULE E BREAKER'

items.text:
MAGIC ELF ROLES @ LaplandUK | 
MANCHESTER AND ASCOT

Location: Manchester and Ascot (2 sites)
Pay: £13.75 per hour + 12.07% holiday pay
Age: 18+

LaplandUK is now casting Magic Elves to help bring Christmas to life this winter.

This ground-breaking immersive theatrical production, featured in its own Channel 4 documentary and showcased on The Apprentice, is recognised as one of the UK's leading immersive festive experiences.

The Magic Elf role is highly interactive. You'll escort families through the experience, guide them to Father Christmas' woodland cabin, take photographs during their visit, and help ensure every guest enjoys a truly magical experience. You'll work in pairs throughout an 8-hour shift, with a mix of performance and operational responsibilities.

No previous acting experience is required—just warmth, energy, and a genuine passion for creating unforgettable experiences for children and their families.

What's included:
• Paid 9-week seasonal contract (October–December), including paid training
• Free shuttle service from Macclesfield Station (Manchester site)
• Free on-site parking
• Free hot meal on every shift
• Professional costume and wardrobe provided

Please note:
• No visible neck or lower arm tattoos due to costume requirements
• Applicants must be available for at least 3 shifts per week

Now booking auditions.

To apply or find out more, email resourcing@lapland.group with your CV or any questions.

Please share this post or tag someone who would make a fantastic Magic Elf.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of fur coat and text that says 'Lapand and CASTING All Genders Genders Age 18+ London or Manchester Base October- December Hourly Rate £13.75 email resourcing@lapland.group resourcing'

If you’re interested, come and give it a go! First class just £3. - The style changes every few weeks. (Take a look at our other videos.)

Looking forward to hearing from some of you,
Andrew

sharedPost.text:
🚨🚨 CALLOUT FOR ARTISTS/COMPANIES FOR PROFIT SHARE EVENT 🚨🚨

Looking for artists/companies for our upcoming Halloween themed scratch nights at the @goldengoosetheatre in South London on the 30th to 31st October 2026.

We are looking for individuals and groups specialising in drama, spoken word/storytelling, music, improvisation, cabaret, magic, comedy and more! What we want is work that's fun, spooky, audience engaging, and deals with exploring issues and themes exploring the dark and complex nature of humanity that would put a shiver down audiences spines!

The goal of this project is towards providing a platform to showcase their work and build an audience 

We would also provide for those who apply audience/critics feedback, stills and footage that can be used for marketing and developing, plus using for applying for fringe festivals and funding in 2027.

To apply email temporal.horizons.2020@gmail.com under the subject heading (Your name/company name - Halloween scratch nights) and you must be available for get-in/tech rehearsal on the 29th of October and be available for two show nights on the 30th and 31st October.

Deadline to apply is 30th August 2026 at 11pm
#callout #spookytheatre #newwork

media.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'LOOKING FOR LONDON + ESSEX ARTISTS AND COMPANIES FOR HALLOWEEN THEMED SCRATCH NIGHTS FOR 30H & 31ST OCTOBER 2026 AT GOLDEN GOOSE THEATRE, LONDON'

May be a graphic of text that says 'TEMPORAL HORIZONS PRODUCTIONS ARE CURRENTLY DEVELOPING A BRAND NEW HALLOWEEN THEMED VARIETY SCRATCH NIGHTS ON THE 30TH AND 31ST OCTOBER 2026 IN LONDON AT THE GOLDEN GOOSE THEATRE WE ARE LOOKING FOR SOLO ARTISTS AND SMALL THEATRICAL COMPANIES (3 TO 4 PERFORMERS MAX) WITH HORROR-THEMED HORROR- -THEMED MATERIAL WITH A RUNTIME OF 5TO 10 MINUTES: SPOKEN WORD/ STORYTELLING •DRAMA COMEDY CABARET •MUSIC ·IMPROVISATION MAGIC WHAT WE WANT IS WORK THAT IS FUN, SPOOKY, AUDIENCE ENGAGING ALONG WITH WORK HAT DEALS WITH CONTEMPORARY ISSUES EXPLORING THE DARK AND COMPLEX NATURE HUMANITY THAT WOULD PUT THE SHIVER'S DOWN AUDIENCES SPINES.'

May be a graphic of text that says 'GOAL THIS PROJECT IS TOWARDS PROVIDING ARTISTS AND COMPANIES PLATFORM TO SHOWCASE THEIR WORK AND TALENTS, AS WELL AS HAVE O, FOOTAGE AND AUDIENCE AND CRITICS FEEDBACK FOR FURTHER DEVELOPMENT AND USING THEIR QUOTES IN MARKETING FOR AND FUTURE PRODUCTIONS IN FRINGE FESTIVALS OR IN APPLYING FUNDING. ARE LOOKING FOR ARTISTS AND COMPANIES HAT ARE OF： ·WORKING CLASS BACKGROUNDS •NEURODIVERGENT ·LGBTQ+ COMMUNITY •DISABLED ·INTERNATIONAL ESTABLISHED GROUPS AND NEWCOMERS. WE WANT To CREATE AN EVENING OF AUDIENCES AND PERFORMERS SHARING STORIES BASED UNIQUE EXPERIENCES AND CULTURAL HERITAGE, AS ALL HAVE DIFFRENT EXPERIENCES SHOWCASE THAT ARTS BELONG EVERYONE, NOT JUST A'

items.groupTitle: Casting For Artists&Dancers Travel All Over The World

items.text:
🌟 DARK HAIRED DANCER NEEDED 🌟 (We already have blondes on our team so please save your time and do not submit if you are!)

📍New Cairo, Egypt 

🗓️ Mid August - Ramadan (6.5 months) 

💰Competitive salary 

💃 Must be highly skilled in Heels, Jazz and Commercial dance. Latin styles are a bonus. 

WORK INCLUDES:
* Dinner show 5/6 days a week
* Performing 5-7 numbers a night with singers and other dancers 
* Special collaboration events 

WHAT WE PROVIDE: 
* Flights to and from Egypt
* Accommodation, own double bedroom. 
* Transport to and from the venue 
* Visa 
* Meals on show nights 
* Perks/discounts at the companies other venues 

You will be performing at the best dinner show in the whole of Egypt 🇪🇬 

To apply:
Please send photos, footage and CV to charlielucyarmstrong@outlook.com 

‼️ WE DO NOT SUPPORT AND ARE NOT ASSOCIATED WITH NEXT ACT GLOBAL ‼️

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of dancing and text that says 'BRUNETTE DANCER NEEDED Dinner DinnerShow Show NEW CAIRO, EGYPT MID AUGuST RAMADAN (6.5 MONTHS) COMPETITIVE SALARY WEARE WE ARE LOOKING FOR A DARK HAIR PROFESSIONAL FEMALE DANCER FOR OUR UPCOMING SEASON- MUST BE HIGHLY SKILLED IN HEELS, JAZZ AND COMMERICAL DANCE. LATIN STYLES ARE A BONUS FLIGHTS AND OMIO COVERED TO APPLY: PLEASE SEND PHOTOS, FOOTAGE AND YOUR ν TO CHARLIELUCYARMSTRONG@ CFARLELUCYARMSIRONG@OUTLOOK.COM OUTLOOK.COM'

items.text: bongoproductions.com

sharedPost.text:
IN PERSON OR ONLINE COACHING with Michael Caruana at bongo productions. 

Sign up for any of the 3 steps our comprehensive CERTIFICATE PROGRAM! 

STEP 1: PRIVATE COACHING - 6x1hr sessions, learn or re-enforce the essentials, with trusted analysis techniques and direction, we prepare and tape contrasting monologues. 

STEP 2: SEMIPRIVATE, SCENE-STUDY - 3x2hr sessions. I partner you, we review and apply the preparation techniques from Step 1. We tape 2 scenes with playback, notes and direction, with a focus on on-camera technique - living the scene! Add to your reel! 

STEP 2, 2nd OPTION: Thursday night SCENE STUDY CLASS A challenging and inspirational class applying fundamental analysis to compelling scenes. Each actor prepares and tapes 2 scenes, with coaching and using 2 cameras. Perfect for beginners to build a stable foundation and working professionals to sharpen acting tools, with a playful vibe.THURSDAYS - 6-9 pm 🎬

STEP 3: THE SUCCESSFUL AUDITIONS WORKSHOP - 2 days, all about auditioning plus SELF-TAPE AUDITIONS, for commercials and film and TV series, we tape your 2 auditions, with critique, coaching, direction and demonstration. Repeats every 3rd month at bongo productions.

Professional coaching, with Michael Caruana, at bongo productions, trusted since 1996! 

For more contact Michael at:
416 294-3754 or visit: bongoproductions.com

items.text:
Poszukujemy charyzmatycznych osobowości do nowego internetowego projektu o tematyce około motoryzacyjnej. Jeśli motoryzacja to Twoje środowisko i masz wyrazisty charakter — zgłoś się. Szukamy m.in. stereotypowego kierowcy BMW, spokojnego kierowcy, taksówkarza, byłego policjanta, byłego albo czynnego kierowcy zawodowego oraz innych osób z mocnymi poglądami na kulturę jazdy. Doświadczenie telewizyjne nie jest wymagane- liczy się autentyczność, osobowość i swoboda przed kamerą.

1. Zdjęcia w Warszawie.

2. Zdjęcia planowane są pod koniec sierpnia albo we wrześniu 2026. Dokładne daty do ustalenia.

3. Wynagrodzenie: 500 zł netto za 1 dzień zdjęciowy i prawa.

W razie zainteresowania, spełnienia wymagań, prosimy o wysłanie zgłoszenia, podając następujące informację:

1. Imię i nazwisko

2. Rok urodzenia

3. Miasto zamieszkania

4. Telefon kontaktowy

5. Adres e-mail

6. Wzrost

7. Link do profilu na Facebooku

8. Opisz kilka zdań o sobie oraz krótkie nagranie wideo (wizytówka).

9. Minimum trzy zdjęcia

Kontakt: rekrutacja@agencjainfernal.pl

W temacie wiadomości prosimy napisać: Nowy projekt motoryzacyjny

Wysłanie zgłoszenie jest jednoznaczne z wyrażeniem zgody na przetwarzanie danych osobowych w celu udziału w nowym projekcie internetowym zgodnie z Rozporządzeniem Parlamentu Europejskiego i Rady (UE) 2016/679 z dnia 27 kwietnia 2016 r. w sprawie ochrony osób fizycznych w związku z przetwarzaniem danych osobowych i w sprawie swobodnego przepływu takich danych oraz uchylenia dyrektywy 95/46/WE (ogólne rozporządzenie o ochronie danych). Administratorem Twoich danych osobowych pozyskanych w procesie rekrutacyjnym jest Agencja Artystyczna INFERNAL. Podanie danych jest dobrowolne, w każdej chwili przysługuje Ci prawo do wglądu do danych, ich poprawiania lub usunięcia. Kontakt do administratora rekrutacja@agencjainfernal.pl.

Do kolejnego lipcowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję juz tylko mężczyzny do roli:

Sklepikarz (35-50) – właściciel sklepu monopolowego. Arogancki, impulsywny, wulgarny.
2 sceny
Data: 22.07
Stawka: 400 zł netto

Chętny Panów zapraszam do wysyłania PILNYCH zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:
1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku
8. Informację kiedy ostatnio grali Państwo w serialu „Gliniarze” 

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
Volunteer Casting call 

In ISO actors to play the character Liam in an up coming metal band comedy series Ensemble

Lead Series Role: Liam (Fumbles) 

Playing Age 20-35

Shoot Commitment: High ( Appears in all episodes)

Description: The newest addition to Hangman's Graveyard. Fumbles has endless enthusiasm but almost no experience. Every task somehow becomes a disaster, yet his optimism never fades. Whether he's destroying equipment, booking the wrong gigs, or misunderstanding simple instructions, his heart is always in the right place.

The comedy comes from sincerity—not stupidity. The audience should genuinely root for him.

**Looking For:**
* Strong comedic timing
* Excellent physical comedy
* Able to improvise naturally
* Comfortable with slapstick
* Must take direction well
* Experienced guitar player 

**Preferred Skills:**
* Ability to play by ear a major asset
* Comfortable around motorcycles and live music
* Improvisation experience

If interested Email at connor.rombough@gmail.com

or our alternative Email at islandtreasurestudios@gmail.com for further audition details

items.text:
We wanted to share this latest audition notice from our friends at True Life Productions (TLP) - please share with anyone you think might be interested. 

Mary Stuart at Peterborough Cathedral.

True Life Productions (TLP), in collaboration with 49Knights, presents a new adaptation of John Drinkwater's theatre play Mary Stuart. 

Presented as a 60-minute live radio drama before an audience, the production reveals Mary as a woman of extraordinary intelligence, emotional depth, and resilience. 

This engaging theatrical experience, in the guise of a 1930s radio broadcast, makes historical drama accessible to contemporary audiences while preserving the richness of its setting and characters and forms part of the Mary Stuart Exhibition at Peterborough Cathedral.

TLP are looking for actors to play Beaton/Randolph (one female actor), Darnley (male actor) and Riccio/Bothwell (one male actor). All actors should be in playing ages between 35 and 50. 

If you are interested, email TLP at hello@truelifeproductions.co.uk for an audition pack.

items.text:
**CAST & CREW CALL FOR LONDON THEATRE PRODUCTION**

Hello, **Cunning Moss Productions** are looking for actors and crew for the upcoming production of "*Skin-for-Scales*" at *The Hope Theatre* for *North Sapph-Fest* on **August 27th & 28th**! The deadline for applications are on midnight on** ***Saturday 18th of July*, and we will be in touch on the week of 20th to announce selections and state schedule to start rehearsals on the week of 27th. Please note that this is an *unpaid* opportunity, however, any *profit* made will be *shared* back to creatives for their commitment.

We are looking forward to receiving emails from you at  cunningmossproductions@gmail.com that includes:

1. A brief introduction about yourself

2. Your general availability until show day on August 27th (+ Tech) & 28th, both at 7pm

3. Secondary Contact Information (Phone Number)

4. A Spotlight/Backstage or CV Link (or link to a General Reel for Range Review, or portfolio for those with existing production/concept work) 

5. Importantly- for actors, the Audition Tape, which should be an unlisted link.

Please look at the attached audition pack link here, or on our Instagram page @cunningmossproductions for more info.

[https://drive.google.com/file/d/1m6nrcJS6FvKKrKXC5gEw1crQu-uXUUb4/view?usp=drivesdk](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1m6nrcJS6FvKKrKXC5gEw1crQu-uXUUb4/view?usp=drivesdk)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Cast & Crew Call Out The new poetic play "Skin-for-Scales" which is part of Hope Theatre' North Sapph-Fest on August 27th (tech + show day) & 28th pm) is looking for a: Leading Actress to play Pardis, the land-stuck girl (F/NB, Early 20s Appearance, Can Sing) Supporting Actress for Darya, The Ocean Mother (F/NB, 20s to 30s, Can Sing) Have availability fromJuly 27th and across August for rehearsals. Please look at the linked audition pack and submit your tape by the Saturday 18th July (Midnight) deadline to cumingmosproductions@gmail.co COT.'

May be an image of text that says 'We are looking for crew members to support the vision of this project, including: •Assistant Director to aid with Production ·Designer to aid with Reimagining our Set ·Music Composer transcribe and build our Mermaid/Ocear Melodies Assistant Director should have general availability to match and assistant in the rehearsal space and production coordination with Director and Producer. We are looking for people who are developing their skills and have great interest in the thematics and poetic aspects of the material. Please see linked document for application and project info, and submit for Saturday 18th ofJuly (Midnight) deadline to aumningmnosproductions@gmail.cm'
May be a doodle of text

items.text:
WARSZAWA 
Szukam pracy w branży krawcowej-filmowej na pół etatu (3-4 dni w tygodniu).
Mam wieloletnie doświadczenie w szyciu i poprawkach krawieckich.
Niżej również dodam stworzone przez mnie stroję.

Moim marzeniem jest praca w kinie, dlatego szukam współpracy z ludźmi z branży filmowej.
Ukończyłam szkołę policealną na kierunku technik animacji filmowej, również mam niewielkie doświadczenie na planie zdjęciowym (jako statystka, klapsiarka i kostiumograf).

Podejmę pracę jako asystentka kostiumografa albo reżysera, lub chętnie wysłucham Waszych propozycji.

Jestem obywatelką Mołdawii.
Mówię płynnie po polsku, znam język rosyjski, podstawy mołdawskiego oraz uczę się języka chińskiego.

Zapraszam do kontaktu przez wiadomość prywatną, albo sms na numer telefonu.

Irina    +48 539 880 204

items.text:
MAGIC ELF ROLES @ LaplandUK | 
MANCHESTER AND ASCOT

Location: Manchester and Ascot (2 sites)
Pay: £13.75 per hour + 12.07% holiday pay
Age: 18+

LaplandUK is now casting Magic Elves to help bring Christmas to life this winter.

This ground-breaking immersive theatrical production, featured in its own Channel 4 documentary and showcased on The Apprentice, is recognised as one of the UK's leading immersive festive experiences.

The Magic Elf role is highly interactive. You'll escort families through the experience, guide them to Father Christmas' woodland cabin, take photographs during their visit, and help ensure every guest enjoys a truly magical experience. You'll work in pairs throughout an 8-hour shift, with a mix of performance and operational responsibilities.

No previous acting experience is required—just warmth, energy, and a genuine passion for creating unforgettable experiences for children and their families.

What's included:
• Paid 9-week seasonal contract (October–December), including paid training
• Free shuttle service from Macclesfield Station (Manchester site)
• Free on-site parking
• Free hot meal on every shift
• Professional costume and wardrobe provided

Please note:
• No visible neck or lower arm tattoos due to costume requirements
• Applicants must be available for at least 3 shifts per week

Now booking auditions.

To apply or find out more, email resourcing@lapland.group with your CV or any questions.

Please share this post or tag someone who would make a fantastic Magic Elf.

Paid Casting Call 

Looking for MEN in their 20s/30s

We’re casting for a test filming of a new social dating show taking place in Hackney, London.

Filming will take place in the evening for roughly 6 hours. 

Participants will receive £100 payment. 

We’re looking for genuine people, comfortable on camera and open to participating in a fun, interactive dating format. 

This is a great opportunity to be part of an early-stage concept and help us shape the future of it.

If you’re interested, please send a message and we’ll be in touch with more details

topComments.text:
Other than stagebox and places like stagecoach/PQA, there aren’t any agencies that insist on attending weekly classes (correct me if I’m wrong)?
Lots of agencies will have open books. 
Where are you based? What’s her particular interest xx
Unfortunately, your agency is not a legitimate agency

items.text:
Jodi Purdy Casting Director

CASTING CALL!!

ADDITIONAL ROLES HAVE BEEN ADDED & SARAH CAN BE 30’s - 40’s & MARK CAN BE 40’s - 50’s.  THE CHAIRMAN’S BREAKDOWN HAS BEEN EXPANDED.

Seeking Non-Union Actors & Actresses to submit for the below captioned roles for an Independent Feature Film 
Written & Directed by David J. McDivitt

“NIGHT WATCH”

Filming: Medford, MA
August 2026
Compensation: TBD

Submit the following via Google Drive or Email Attachment to:

JodiPurdyCasting@gmail.com
Subject: NIGHT WATCH – [ROLE] – [YOUR NAME]

Name
Cell
Email
Location
Photos 
Acting Resume
Reels - if available
Links - if available 
1 minute Introduction Video

Questions? Send in Email! Not Facebook Messenger! Not in Comments!

ROLES:

SARAH (Lead)
Female | 30’s - 40’s | Caucasian

A Vanguard Financial administrator whose Christmas is shattered when a hit squad invades her home and forces her to use her Level 5 server access. 
Terrified, intelligent, protective, and deeply devoted to her husband. Sarah is one of the film’s most layered characters, balancing vulnerability with extraordinary strength.

MARK (Lead) 
Male | 40s - 50’s | Caucasian

A recently retired detective held captive and tortured during the home invasion. Calm under pressure, morally grounded, and impossible to break. His battle with the antagonist is one of philosophy and willpower as much as survival.

NEW ROLES:

CHARACTER: GRANDPA (JOHN)

Supporting / Day Player | Male, 60s–70s
Sarah’s father — easygoing, affectionate, happy to play along with the family’s Christmas morning routine.

CHARACTER: GRANDMA (BETTE)

Supporting / Day Player | Female, 60s–70s
Sarah’s mother — warm, doting, a little blunt, thrilled to whisk the grandkids off to New York for the holiday.

CHARACTER: LILY
Supporting / Day Player | Female, 11 - Caucasian
Sarah and Mark’s daughter — bright, a little bossy with her younger brother, excited for the trip.

CHARACTER: LEO
Supporting / Day Player | Male, 8
Sarah and Mark’s son — playful, a little mischievous with his older sister, excited for the trip.

EXPANDED CHARACTER BREAKDOWN:

THE CHAIRMAN

Previous: Male, 60s. Sophisticated, elegant, and completely in control.

Few lines – but every word carries enormous weight.

Lean further into old-money excess and detachment – a man so insulated by wealth that household staff attend to his most basic personal needs. Imperious, entitled, and thoroughly out of touch with ordinary life. Still sophisticated and controlled on the surface; the disconnection from reality should read as absolute, unexamined comfort, not cartoonish villainy.

ONE (Lead/Antagonist)
Male | 40s | Open Ethnicity
 
The brilliant, philosophical leader of the hit squad. Calm, precise, and chillingly intelligent. He doesn’t see himself as a villain—he believes he’s correcting a broken system. Looking for an actor who can command a scene through quiet confidence rather than intimidation.

BENNY (Supporting)
Male | 20s | Open Ethnicity 

A young security guard with a passion for technology and cybersecurity. Friendly, funny, and genuinely likable. Benny unexpectedly becomes one of the story’s emotional anchors.

THE CHAIRMAN - (Supporting)
Male | 60s | Caucasian

The unseen power behind the operation. Sophisticated, elegant, and completely in control. Few lines—but every word carries enormous weight. A memorable role for a seasoned actor.

HACKER (Supporting)
Female | 20s–30s | Open Ethnicity

The technical specialist of the hit squad. Brilliant, fearless, and physically capable. Sharp-witted with a dry sense of humor, she’s completely at home inside the server room—and dangerous in a fight.

BRUNO (Supporting)
Male | 30s–40s | Open Ethnicity

The team’s physical enforcer. Tough, impulsive, and impatient. Beneath the muscle is a man carrying personal pain and quiet regret, giving the character surprising emotional depth.

Jodi Purdy Casting Director

CASTING CALL!!

ADDITIONAL ROLES HAVE BEEN ADDED & SARAH CAN BE 30’s - 40’s & MARK CAN BE 40’s - 50’s.  THE CHAIRMAN’S BREAKDOWN HAS BEEN EXPANDED.

Seeking Non-Union Actors & Actresses to submit for the below captioned roles for an Independent Feature Film 
Written & Directed by David J. McDivitt

“NIGHT WATCH”

Filming: Medford, MA
August 2026
Compensation: TBD

Submit the following via Google Drive or Email Attachment to:

JodiPurdyCasting@gmail.com
Subject: NIGHT WATCH – [ROLE] – [YOUR NAME]

Name
Cell
Email
Location
Photos 
Acting Resume
Reels - if available
Links - if available 
1 minute Introduction Video

Questions? Send in Email! Not Facebook Messenger! Not in Comments!

ROLES:

SARAH (Lead)
Female | 30’s - 40’s | Caucasian

A Vanguard Financial administrator whose Christmas is shattered when a hit squad invades her home and forces her to use her Level 5 server access. 
Terrified, intelligent, protective, and deeply devoted to her husband. Sarah is one of the film’s most layered characters, balancing vulnerability with extraordinary strength.

MARK (Lead) 
Male | 40s - 50’s | Caucasian

A recently retired detective held captive and tortured during the home invasion. Calm under pressure, morally grounded, and impossible to break. His battle with the antagonist is one of philosophy and willpower as much as survival.

NEW ROLES:

CHARACTER: GRANDPA (JOHN)

Supporting / Day Player | Male, 60s–70s

Sarah’s father — easygoing, affectionate, happy to play along with the family’s Christmas morning routine.

CHARACTER: GRANDMA (BETTE)

Supporting / Day Player | Female, 60s–70s

Sarah’s mother — warm, doting, a little blunt, thrilled to whisk the grandkids off to New York for the holiday.

CHARACTER: LILY
Supporting / Day Player | Female, 11 - Caucasian

Sarah and Mark’s daughter — bright, a little bossy with her younger brother, excited for the trip.

CHARACTER: LEO
Supporting / Day Player | Male, 8

Sarah and Mark’s son — playful, a little mischievous with his older sister, excited for the trip.

EXPANDED CHARACTER BREAKDOWN:

THE CHAIRMAN

Previous: Male, 60s. Sophisticated, elegant, and completely in control.

Few lines – but every word carries enormous weight.

Lean further into old-money excess and detachment – a man so insulated by wealth that household staff attend to his most basic personal needs. Imperious, entitled, and thoroughly out of touch with ordinary life. Still sophisticated and controlled on the surface; the disconnection from reality should read as absolute, unexamined comfort, not cartoonish villainy.

ONE (Lead/Antagonist)
Male | 40s | Open Ethnicity
 
The brilliant, philosophical leader of the hit squad. Calm, precise, and chillingly intelligent. He doesn’t see himself as a villain—he believes he’s correcting a broken system. Looking for an actor who can command a scene through quiet confidence rather than intimidation.

BENNY (Supporting)
Male | 20s | Open Ethnicity 

A young security guard with a passion for technology and cybersecurity. Friendly, funny, and genuinely likable. Benny unexpectedly becomes one of the story’s emotional anchors.

HACKER (Supporting)
Female | 20s–30s | Open Ethnicity

The technical specialist of the hit squad. Brilliant, fearless, and physically capable. Sharp-witted with a dry sense of humor, she’s completely at home inside the server room—and dangerous in a fight.

BRUNO (Supporting)
Male | 30s–40s | Open Ethnicity

The team’s physical enforcer. Tough, impulsive, and impatient. Beneath the muscle is a man carrying personal pain and quiet regret, giving the character surprising emotional depth.

Hi everyone! My name is Emma and I am one of the producers for the upcoming short film The Story I Drew of Him. We are excited to be starting our casting process! 

Filming will take place in the greater Vancouver area, August 15-17th and August 22nd-23rd (tentatively).

If you are interested in being a part of this amazing project please email your headshot, demo reel, resume, and the name of the character you are auditioning for to thestoryidrewofhim@gmail.com by this Monday July 27th.

items.text:
On cherche des Chevrolet. Des Chevrolet récents. De vieux Chevrolet. De vrais Chevrolet. Des Chevrolet avec lesquels vous avez fait de la course. Des Chevrolet qui ont été retapés, ou que vous avez l’intention de retaper.

Pas le genre de véhicule qui est dans le stationnement d’un concessionnaire, mais le genre qui est stationné dans votre entrée, ou dans votre garage, ou qui n’est presque jamais stationné.

Bref, si vous avez un Chevrolet, que vous aimez votre Chevrolet, il pourrait être la vedette de notre prochain projet.

Compensation de 1 500 $ CA si votre véhicule est sélectionné et utilisé dans notre publicité.

Cette offre est ouverte aux citoyennes et citoyens du Canada ou aux personnes qui ont leur statut de résidence permanente au Canada.

Tous les frais de déplacement et d'hébergement requis pour les personnes habitant hors de la province seront pris en charge.

DATES IMPORTANTES

Audition via Zoom : 31 juillet

Tournage : Du 9 au 14 août 2026 dans la région du Grand Toronto

*** TOUTES LES CANDIDATURES DOIVENT ÊTRE ENVOYÉES AVANT LE 29 JUILLET À 9 H 00 (HE)

Veuillez utiliser le lien de soumission ci-dessous:
https://onveutmettrevotrechevroletenvedette.castingcrane.com/

**CASTING CALL – PAID, NON-UNION BRAND VIDEO**

Novel Productions is casting **two roles** for a small **30-second Brand Video**

**Shoot Location:** Burnaby, BC

**Shoot Date:** August 26, 2026 (3-4 hours, depending on role)

**Compensation:** Flat rate of $300

**ROLES:**

• **The Broker** — Age **25–35** | Male, ethnicity open

• **The Waitress** — Age **35–50** | Male, ethnicity open

**SUBMISSIONS:**

Please send **headshot, acting resume, and reel (if available)** to: **casting@novelproductions.ca**

**Subject line:**

*Novel Casting - Role Name - Your Name*

This is a non-union flat-rate project intended for digital usage.

Selected submissions will be contacted with sides and instructions for self-tape auditions.

We encourage submissions from actors of all backgrounds.

items.text:
Check out Tom Hardy’s latest documentary that I had the chance to appear in!

If you’d like to hear how I land roles, or you’re looking to get into the film and TV industry yourself, comment “INFO” below or send me a DM. Happy to share what I’ve learned along the way!

Best, 

Jorro.

sharedPost.text: Special Forces documentary featuring Phil Campion, Jorro and Tom Hardy.

Check out Tom Hardy’s latest documentary that I had the chance to appear in!

If you’d like to hear how I land roles, or you’re looking to get into the film and TV industry yourself, comment “INFO” below or send me a DM. Happy to share what I’ve learned along the way!

Best, 

Jorro.

💬 Plaudermeeting: Kunst und Wirtschaft – Kooperationen mit Unternehmen 
🎙️ Moderation: Monika Medek

sharedPost.text:
🎥 In diesem Reel spricht Michael Weilguny über Vergünstigungen für Mitglieder in unserem Verein. 

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 173. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 11.08.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

💬 Plaudermeeting: Kunst und Wirtschaft – Kooperationen mit Unternehmen 
🎙️ Moderation: Monika Medek 

Ob Sponsoring, Auftragsarbeiten oder CSR-Partnerschaften: Kunst kann für Unternehmen einen echten Mehrwert schaffen – in der Kommunikation, im gesellschaftlichen Engagement, bei der Mitarbeiter*innen-Bindung oder als Impuls für Innovation. 

Doch welche Schnittstellen gibt es zwischen Kultur und Wirtschaft? Welche Kooperationsmöglichkeiten lassen sich entwickeln? Und wie formuliere ich ein Angebot so, dass es für Unternehmen attraktiv, verständlich und relevant ist? 

In diesem interaktiven Plaudermeeting sprechen wir über Strategien, Argumente und konkrete Ansätze, mit denen sich künstlerische Projekte erfolgreich im unternehmerischen Umfeld positionieren lassen. 

Ein Frühstück für alle, die neue Partnerschaften aufbauen, ihre Projekte professionell präsentieren und die Zusammenarbeit zwischen Kunst und Wirtschaft aktiv gestalten möchten. 

©Congerdesign 

📲 Mehr Infos: 
Website: www.KünstlerBusinessFrühstück.at  
Facebook: https://fb.me/e/7MvGL7qkB  

#KunstUndWirtschaft #KulturUndWirtschaft #Kulturmanagement #Kreativwirtschaft

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon im Doppelpack

MOVIETIME OPEN AIR - die Zweite 2026

In der neuen Ausgabe bringt Sarah Fuchs die Highlights aus St. Pölten, Eggenburg und Mistelbach zu Gehör. 

Andreas Zeugswetter erzählt anlässlich 30 Jahre Mondscheinkino wie alles begann, gibt aber auch Anekdoten zum Besten. 

MOVIETIME KW 30/2026

31 Jahre nach dem Debüt und weiteren Fortsetzungen kehren die beliebten Figuren inkl. neuen Charakteren in TOY STORY 5 zurück. Ob dies ein Film voller Nostalgie oder doch auch ein Streifen für die Social Media Generation ist, berichtet ihnen Sarah Fuchs. 

Im Rahmen des Weinviertelfestivals 2026 konnte unsere Moderatorin mit den OrganisatorInnen des Projekt KellerSchichten plaudern. Wie viel Spaß dabei mit an Bord war, hören Sie bei uns.

Mittwoch 22.7.2026 von 17 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

Zapraszamy do Statystowania w projekcie dla TikTok
Poszukujemy Osób w wieku 18-45 
Stawka za udział 100zł netto  płatne po planie  
(Plan potrwa max trzy godziny) 

❗️PROSIMY DZIŚ O PILNE ZGŁOSZENIA OSOBY POSIADAJĄCE ROWER, HULAJNOGĘ CZY DESKOROLKĘ (WRAZ Z WŁASNYM KASKIEM) ❗️

25 Lipca (Sobota) 
- Osoby do scen w Skatepark(osoby jeżdżące na rowerze, deskorolkach, hulajnogach <proszę o informacje w mailu> 

26 Lipca (Niedziela) 
- Powiśle sceny nad Wisłą (osoby jeżdżące na rowerze, deskorolkach, hulajnogach <proszę o informacje w mailu> 

Zapraszamy do zgłoszeń osoby bez akcentu możliwe do powiedzenia jedno zdanie. 

Osoby zainteresowane prosimy o PILNE zgłoszenia na e-mail: statysci@profesjatv.pl
w temacie wpisujemy: Tiktok oraz jeden wybrany dzień 

Wiadomość powinna zawierać:
• imię i nazwisko, wiek
• aktualne zdjęcia twarzy i sylwetki 
• telefon kontaktowy 
• wymiary (rozmiar ubrań, wzrost, pas, talia) 
• oraz informacje o posiadanym sprzęcie np. Rower, Hulajnoga, Deskorolka (wraz z własnym kaskiem) 

Plan będzie realizowany w Warszawie 

Wysyłając zgłoszenie wyrażają Państwo dobrowolna zgodę na przetwarzanie Danych Osobowych, RODO dla PROFESJA TV

Pozdrawiamy!

- Osoby do scen w Skatepark(osoby jeżdżące na rowerze, deskorolkach, hulajnogach <proszę o informacje w mailu> 

26 Lipca (Niedziela) 
- Powiśle sceny nad Wisłą (osoby jeżdżące na rowerze, deskorolkach, hulajnogach <proszę o informacje w mailu> 

Zapraszamy do zgłoszeń osoby bez akcentu możliwe do powiedzenia jedno zdanie. 

Osoby zainteresowane prosimy o PILNE zgłoszenia na e-mail: statysci@profesjatv.pl
w temacie wpisujemy: Tiktok oraz jeden wybrany dzień 

Wiadomość powinna zawierać:
• imię i nazwisko, wiek
• aktualne zdjęcia twarzy i sylwetki 
• telefon kontaktowy 
• wymiary (rozmiar ubrań, wzrost, pas, talia) 
• oraz informacje o posiadanym sprzęcie np. Rower, Hulajnoga, Deskorolka (wraz z własnym kaskiem) 

Plan będzie realizowany w Warszawie 

Wysyłając zgłoszenie wyrażają Państwo dobrowolna zgodę na przetwarzanie Danych Osobowych, RODO dla PROFESJA TV

Pozdrawiamy!

items.text:
📍 **POZNAŃ i okolice**

🎬 **Poszukujemy bohaterki kampanii społecznej Fundacji Studio Figura**

Fundacja Studio Figura realizuje kampanię społeczną poświęconą **hejtowi, dyskryminacji i ocenianiu ludzi przez pryzmat wyglądu**.

Do udziału w spocie poszukujemy **dziewczyny lub młodej kobiety w wieku 16–25 lat**, która z własnego doświadczenia wie, czym jest ocenianie, wyśmiewanie lub hejt związany z wyglądem – w tym z chorobą otyłościową lub nadmierną masą ciała.

🟠 Szukamy osoby, która chciałaby swoim udziałem pomóc innym i pokazać, że za wyglądem każdego człowieka kryje się historia, której często nie znamy. Pragniemy stworzyć spot, który skłoni do refleksji i pokaże, że słowa mogą ranić, a empatia i zrozumienie mają ogromną moc.

📍 Poszukujemy osoby:

• w wieku **16–25 lat,**

• otwartej na udział w nagraniu,

• która utożsamia się z przesłaniem kampanii i chce wspólnie z nami przeciwdziałać hejtowi oraz dyskryminacji.

Jeśli czujesz, że to coś dla Ciebie odezwij się do mnie w wiadomości prywatnej, lub pozostaw komentarz!

Razem możemy sprawić, że choć jedna osoba poczuje się mniej samotna i bardziej zrozumiana. 🧡

#KampaniaSpołeczna #niehejtuj #zwiększanieświadomości

items.text:
Myślisz o dołączeniu do swojej grupy/ teatru postaci maskotki albo do twojego obiektu lub potrzebujesz pomocy w rozwinięciu obecnego konceptu, a może poszukujesz osoby, która profesjonalnie wcieli się w postać podczas wydarzenia, koncertu, imprezy firmowej itp

Mam wieloletnie doświadczenie jako performer maskotki i chętnie zajmę się tematem kompleksowo, według potrzeb i oczekiwań. 

Opracuję charakterystykę postaci, przygotuję występy, choreografię i oczywiście osobiście wystąpię zarówno prowadząc interakcje, jak i podczas pokazów. 

Lokalizacja: Kraków i okolice lub południowa Polska z zakwaterowaniem

items.text:
Szukam dublerki do jednej sceny  – Warszawa

Szukam dublerki do jednej sceny  – Warszawa

Na 2 lub 3 sierpnia szukam dublerki do nagrania filmu w formacie pionowym.

Szczegóły:

📍 Warszawa
⏰ Czas pracy: ok. 6 godzin
💰 Stawka: 600 zł

Do nagrania jest tylko jedna scena – główną bohaterkę odwiedza jej druga kopia, nowa wersja samej siebie.

Rola bez kwestii mówionych. Twarz nie będzie widoczna, nie będzie również nagrywany głos.

Najważniejsze jest jak największe podobieństwo pod względem sylwetki i wymiarów 

Wymiary aktorki:

*wzrost 157cm

*biust 76 cm

*talia 66 cm 

*biodra 84 cm

*rozmiar ubrań XS

*rozm.buta EU 37

rude włosy!!!!!!

Jeśli jesteś zainteresowana, wyślij proszę kilka aktualnych zdjęć oraz swoje wymiary

Data: 13.08, 14.08 i 15.08
Stawka: 1800 zł netto za 3 dni

- Daria Rogozińska (25) – dziewczyna z dobrego domu, ładna, typ młodej pracownicy korporacyjnej. 
Data: 13.08 i 14.08
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za 2 dni

- Sąsiadka Lidia (70) –  zadbana starsza pani z bloku.
Data: 13.08 
Stawka: 400 zł netto

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia WYŁĄCZNIE MAILOWO na adres: outsetola@op.pl

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę do nagrania scenę ze scenariusza)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach lub Gliniarzach Śląsk

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

📸 PHOTOGRAPHER CREW CALL
📍 Zuma Malibu, California

Smyles Entertainment is currently assembling a small team of photographers for our upcoming Spotlight Saturday community event on Saturday, August 22.

This is an opportunity to expand your portfolio while collaborating with current and aspiring and experienced models, actors, hair & makeup artists, and fellow creatives in one of Southern California’s most iconic coastal locations.

We’re intentionally keeping our photographer team small and currently have 4 photographer spots available.

This opportunity is a great fit for:

* Photography students

* Emerging photographers building their portfolios

* Creatives interested in fashion, portrait, beauty, and entertainment photography

We’re looking for photographers who:

* Have a passion for photography and creativity

* Are dependable and professional

* Enjoy directing both new and experienced talent

📍 Location: Zuma Malibu, California

🗓️ Date: Saturday, August 22

💼 TFP

For more information, please email crew@smylesentertainment.com.

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL FOR FEATURE FILM IN LOS ANGELES**

**Project:** TOMORROW MORNING

**Format:** Independent Feature Film

**Genre:** Psychological Drama

**Location:** Los Angeles

**Length: **2-Day-Shoot 

**Shot in: **Real time to represent a 24-hour time frame

**Non-Union:** With pay, meals, and digital copy

**Pay:** **Principal **- $400 for 2 Days

**Non- Principal** - $75 for 1 Half-Day

**Synopsis: **As reports of war, unrest, and catastrophe dominate the nightly news, a religious, agoraphobic couple withdraw further from friends and family and prepare for the upcoming apocalypse they believe is taking place outside their front door.

**Principal Roles:**

**JOHN** (52), the husband, he’s a thoughtful, intelligent man who has spent years trying to reconcile world events with Biblical prophecy. He isn't charismatic or fanatical; he's methodical. He's calm, articulate, affectionate, and emotionally available. He isn't a fire-and- brimstone preacher. He's a husband trying to make sense of a world that increasingly feels broken.

**MARY **(50), the Wife, she is warmer than John and less analytical. More emotionally intuitive. Her faith isn't intellectual. It's relational. She doesn't need notebooks or timelines. She simply trusts. Unlike John, she doesn't need evidence. She needs reassurance. She becomes the emotional heart of the film because she genuinely grieves for everyone she believes will be left behind.

**Non-Principal Roles:**

**DAVID** (30), John's Best Friend, Dead for 20 years from an overdose. Appears only to John. Not frightening. Not ghostly. Comfortable. Natural.

**JESUS** (33), Never portrayed as spectacular. He appears exactly the way someone Mary has loved her entire life might appear. Soft. Patient. Listening more than speaking.

**GRACE **(28), the daughter, she represents: ordinary life continuing. She loves her parents. Had this conversation before. She’s stopped trying to convince them.

**JAMES** (25), the son, More confrontational. Not angry. Heartbroken.He's the final emotional attempt to pull them back into reality. Unlike the daughter, he refuses to give up.

**FATHER THOMAS** (55), the Pastor, He's compassionate. Patient. He’s trying to save two friends. He believes scripture. He simply doesn't believe Revelation is unfolding tomorrow.

**DR. WILLIAMS** (46), the Neurologist, Black. Professional. Empathetic. The rational counterweight. Never dismissive. He explains their mindset as being a medical condition.

**Submit: **Reels & Resumes by Aug 31st to: donotdisturbfilms@gmail.com

Emailed!

items.text:
An amazing opportunity for actors! 

🇺🇸General American Accent for Actors with **Sam Malone** – **Royal Central lecturer, RADA–NYU Tisch voice coach**, and voice practitioner whose students have gone on to work in **Heartstopper, Masters of the Air, Hadestown, Six, Mean Girls, Mamma Mia!** and more.

by Actorverse [www.actorverse.co.uk](https://www.actorverse.co.uk/) 

Build a stronger, more authentic **General American accent**. 

This practical **2-hour workshop** is designed for actors with **beginner to intermediate General American experience**. You'll work on a contemporary U.S. scene with other actors while receiving personalised accent coaching in a supportive small-group environment.

📅 **Tuesday 4 August** | 6–8 PM
📅 **Tuesday 18 August** | 6–8 PM
*Each session features a different scene, so you're welcome to attend one or both.*

**BOOK HERE **

[https://www.tickettailor.com/events/actorverse](https://www.tickettailor.com/events/actorverse)

*or visit *[www.actorverse.co.uk](https://www.actorverse.co.uk/)* for more information*

📍 **Fitzrovia Community Centre**
2 Foley Street, London W1W 6DL

🎟️ Limited places available to ensure personalised feedback.

American Playlist Theater is bringing The Holiday Radio Theater Extravaganza to the Garrison Playhouse in Rollinsford, New Hampshire, and we're looking for talented actors, musicians, and filmmakers/videographers to join our holiday production team!

This production features:

  Three original holiday radio plays

  Two holiday readings

  Live sound effects

  Live music

  Plenty of laughs

  A whole lot of Christmas spirit!

Performance Dates:

  December 4–6 & December 11–13, 2026

 Auditions

  Wednesday, August 26, 2026

  6:00 PM – 8:30 PM

 Garrison Playhouse, Rollinsford, NH

 No radio theater experience? No problem! 

If you love storytelling, music, or capturing the magic on camera, we'd love to meet you.

Interested? Contact Sean Sullivan at:

  sullivansean3535@gmail.com

Come help us bring Radio Theater to life this Christmas!

items.summary:
American Playlist Theater is bringing The Holiday Radio Theater Extravaganza to the Garrison Playhouse in Rollinsford, New Hampshire, and we're looking for talented actors, musicians, and filmmakers/videographers to join our holiday production team!

This production features:

  Three original holiday radio plays

  Two holiday readings

  Live sound effects

  Live music

  Plenty of laughs

  A whole lot of Christmas spirit!

Performance Dates:

  December 4–6 & December 11–13, 2026

 Auditions

  Wednesday, August 26, 2026

  6:00 PM – 8:30 PM

 Garrison Playhouse, Rollinsford, NH

 No radio theater experience? No problem! 

If you love storytelling, music, or capturing the magic on camera, we'd love to meet you.

Interested? Contact Sean Sullivan at:

  sullivansean3535@gmail.com

Come help us bring Radio Theater to life this Christmas!

[#AmericanPlaylistTheater](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/americanplaylisttheater?__cft__[0]=AZZozhBBsejXvOiaH5feV7yB9hPJ_2ZffA7CFZNst7l5hhM-LimI3cQG2MW0srnj7a59o9SFermFJyejpqnH-WznfuYsevr40X6o3Ew35AueVQ&__tn__=*NK-R) items.text:
THE STAGE IS CALLING. Season Auditions are OPEN!

Orlando Family Stage is searching for the next incredible artists to join our 2026–2027 Centennial Season!

From world premieres to beloved favorites, this season brings stories to life for thousands of young audiences and families across Central Florida and we want YOU to be part of the magic. 

We are currently accepting video auditions for our upcoming season, featuring:

🎃 The Best Halloween Ever — World Premiere
🎄 A Charlie Brown Christmas Live on Stage!
🐱 Pete The Cat’s Big Hollywood Adventure
✨ A New Spring Musical — World Premiere (title coming soon!)
🐉 Dragons Love Tacos 2: The MuSequel

All roles are paid, and performers ages 11+ are encouraged to audition. Orlando Family Stage is committed to inclusive casting and welcomes performers of all backgrounds and experiences.

Ready to bring your talent, creativity, and imagination to the stage? Audition details, submission guidelines, and everything you need to know are waiting for you at the link in our bio. 🎭

📅 Video submissions are due July 26, 2026.

Know an actor who belongs on this stage? Tag them below and help spread the word! ⬇️

https://orlandofamilystage.com/get-involved/auditions/

#OrlandoAuditions #ActorAuditions #OrlandoTheatre

sharedPost.text:
AUDITION DAY BATCH 2 : JULY 18, 2026! 🎬

JOIN HERE:  https://www.instagram.com/channel/AbbiunLum8WDRHbc/

BE PART OF A FILM THAT WILL
REVOLUTIONIZE PHILIPPINE CINEMA.

We're looking for actors for the full-length feature film PARAPO, an adaptation of the critically acclaimed short film, written and directed by FAMAS' youngest Best Director awardee, Jhonny Bobier.

DATE: JULY 18, 2026
TIME: 8AM - 4PM
VENUE: Quezon City,
(exact loc soon to be announced)

REQUIREMENTS:
- two photos: one headshot and one full-body shot.
- with or without acting experience.
- prepare a 1-minute monologue of your choice.
- wear a white shirt on audition day.

AUDITION PROCESS:
- first-come, first-served.
- register to get a number.
- introduce yourself, share your experience, and perform your 1-minute monologue when called.
- stay or leave after performance.
- confirmation sent to your provided email.

See you all there!

#PARAPO2028
#parapofilm
#JhonnyBobier
#Castingcall
#lookingforactors
#auditionday

items.title: Bonjour tout le monde

items.text:
Recherche partenaire pour Auditions conservatoire Dijon bordeaux septembre
Bonjour tout le monde, je suis un jeune comédien amateur de 28 ans et je recherche un ou une partenaire pour m'aider à concourir pour le conservatoire de Dijon et le conservatoire de Bordeaux, début septembre.

Je présente la scène onclenrie tiré de la pièce Debris de Denis Kelly

Je suis à Bouguenais près de Nantes, et je recherche un ou une partenaire dans les alentours que ce soit À Angers, dans les alentours de Nantes ou autre part... Ect. 

Étant donné que je suis amateur, je ne pourrai pas vous rémunérer, je travaille la semaine et je n'ai pas les moyens de rémunérer à chaque répétition mon partenaire, cependant bien évidemment que les frais de déplacement pour le lieu de l'audition seront compris 

Si jamais tu es disponible, cet été le samedi et dimanche et que tu peux m'aider n'hésite pas à me contacter rapidement soit par Messenger, par mail, en m'appelant ou en m'envoyant un sms.

Téléphone et sms : 0652069457

Mail: alexandre.primakoffpro@gmail.com 

Messenger : Alexandre Primakoff 

En te souhaitant un bien bel été !

topComments.text: Salut j’suis comédien/acteur. Je px t’aider en visio stv (si jamais t’as pas mieux). Me rendre physiquement à Bdx ne me pose pas de pb.

items.text:
Hello! I'm currently seeking a Colorist and an Audio Post-Production Engineer / Re-Recording Mixer for an independent feature documentary nearing post-production.

Colorist: I'm looking for someone with documentary or narrative feature experience who can help develop a natural, cinematic look.

Audio: The work is primarily dialogue cleanup, EQ, balancing, noise reduction, and final mix preparation. I'll be handling the cue and sync music, so this is more about sculpting and enhancing the existing audio than creating an extensive sound design from scratch.

If you're interested, please send me a DM with:

Your CV or résumé

A link to your reel, website, or portfolio

Relevant documentary or feature film credits

General availability and rates

I look forward to connecting with talented post-production professionals. Recommendations and shares are always appreciated.

[#Documentary](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/documentary?__cft__[0]=AZbMuYoGIeYkIt75Ef1p0IGVR0jz9qL06YQZ3vyQSs4ZSzQzJ06eBDJjwiqnLfGKD4d1f14ZMF88r2_7zCEi-Ncy64pNtRFJYwMKxkD1WIMZx9XhW0iVWbWrC99mVvau_G-cT3qcezKzoCHGRWD0p0Yl-18YTIc-DcY23hH1ftkiUeGKEs3oxwMOBraEwxA1oS0&__tn__=*NK-R) [#DocumentaryFilm](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/documentaryfilm?__cft__[0]=AZbMuYoGIeYkIt75Ef1p0IGVR0jz9qL06YQZ3vyQSs4ZSzQzJ06eBDJjwiqnLfGKD4d1f14ZMF88r2_7zCEi-Ncy64pNtRFJYwMKxkD1WIMZx9XhW0iVWbWrC99mVvau_G-cT3qcezKzoCHGRWD0p0Yl-18YTIc-DcY23hH1ftkiUeGKEs3oxwMOBraEwxA1oS0&__tn__=*NK-R) [#PostProduction](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/postproduction?__cft__[0]=AZbMuYoGIeYkIt75Ef1p0IGVR0jz9qL06YQZ3vyQSs4ZSzQzJ06eBDJjwiqnLfGKD4d1f14ZMF88r2_7zCEi-Ncy64pNtRFJYwMKxkD1WIMZx9XhW0iVWbWrC99mVvau_G-cT3qcezKzoCHGRWD0p0Yl-18YTIc-DcY23hH1ftkiUeGKEs3oxwMOBraEwxA1oS0&__tn__=*NK-R)

sharedPost.text:
ALESSI HARTIGAN CASTING

TV SERIES SEEKING PHOTO DOUBLE 

•  Males ages 50-60s
•  Heights ranging from 5’7”-5’9”
•  Weights ranging from 250-300
•  No experience necessary 
•  Similar looks to actor in the photo 

PLEASE EMAIL SUBMISSIONS BY:
Tuesday July 21st, 2026 12:00PM

HOW TO SUBMIT:
Please email the following information to KCMO@ahartcasting.com 
Use the subject “Kyle PD”

1. Full name
2. Contact details (phone number, email address)
3. Sizes (height, weight, suit, pants, & shoe size)
4. Current Selfie (with no hats or sunglasses against a plain white background)
5. City & State you currently live in

Paid Casting Call for Dating Show

We’re casting for a test filming of a new social dating show taking place in Central London.

Filming will take place in the evening for roughly 6 hours. Participants will receive £100 payment. 

We’re looking for genuine people, comfortable on camera and open to participating in a fun, interactive dating format. 

This is a great opportunity to be part of an early-stage concept and help us shape the future of it.

If you’re interested, please send a message or comment below and we’ll be in touch with more details.

sharedPost.text:
CASTING CALL

KIRSTY KINNEAR CASTING

CASTING CALL FOR 12–14 YR OLD BOY FOR CENTRAL ROLE IN FEATURE FILM

Casting Director, Kirsty Kinnear (FAST X, THE RETURNED, A BOY CALLED CHRISTMAS) is currently looking for a 12–14yr old boy to play 13yrs for a central role in a feature film directed by an acclaimed filmmaker and production team.

The character is physically energetic and adventurous but is also a loner. He has a zest for life and a mischievous twinkle in his eye. Should be able to swim and do football kick ups.

Ideally would be based in Cornwall or Devon but open to a slightly more distant base for the right person.

NB: The role is yet to hit puberty (no voice changes or visible signs of adolescence.)

Should be available from end of Sept to mid November 2026.

Filming in Cornwall.

This is a paid role. No previous professional acting experience is necessary.

NB: This is a deeply imaginative coming-of-age story that explores sensitive issues along with some dark and psychological themes.

If your young person would like to be considered, please send a photo along with their age, date of birth, any drama experience and their location in one email to:

kinnearcasting@gmail.com

Applicants must be submitted by a parent or legal guardian. If the young person has an agent, please could submissions be made through them.

Deadline for submissions: 26th July 2026

We will review submissions and then be in touch with those who we feel might be suitable for the role. Thank you.

 #castingcallnetwork #actor #actorslife #castingcallsunitedkingdom #officialcastingcallsuk #thecastingcallsuk #castingcallsuk #ukcastingcalls #actorslife #actors

items.text: Looking to get my daughter with a casting agency. She is interested in print and film. We’ve gotten some requests for self-tapes independently, but am hoping to find some who has a wider net!

topComments.text: Get her into an acting class. Unless she’s going to be print only, she’ll need a class on how to act for the camera. Then when she has some experience, maybe a few projects under her belt, you can submit to agencies for representation.

What city are you in?
And just fyi, what you are looking for is a TALENT agency.  There are talent agencies who represent talent and there are casting directors who hold auditions. But technically there is no such thing as a casting agency.

items.text:
Hello everyone! I am currently offering a hugely discounted rate for August only, a 30 minute initial consultation for only £20! I am a Musical Theatre teacher with 10 years experience and extensive SEN experience currently offering private sessions in dance, drama, singing, musical theatre and LAMDA. Book your initial consultation now to discuss what we can work on, look at your current material (if any!) and come up with a plan going forward for you to learn in the best way you can! 

https://calendar.app.google/QfDJdu9JarHiUN4XA

Book your session now for August at this exclusive discount!

items.text:
LOOKING FOR FEMALE AND MALE VOICE ACTOR FOR MURDER MYSTERY
We are looking for a make and female talented voice actor to take on the role of The Victim in our brand new immersive murder mystery dining experience, The Enquiry London.

This is a key role. Your voice will be heard by every guest throughout the night, narrating the story, delivering clues, and guiding guests through the direction of the game. Think dramatic, compelling, and captivating.

THE ROLE

The voice of the victim. Pre-recorded audio that forms the backbone of the entire guest experience from start to finish.

WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 • Strong vocal range and ability to convey emotion through voice alone

 • Confident delivery with a natural dramatic tone

 • Experience in voice acting, narration, or audio drama is a plus but not essential

HOW TO APPLY

Send a short voice note or audio sample to:

📧 theenquirylondon@gmail.com

This is a one off paid recording project. Payment will be discussed based on experience.

items.text:
Norwegian Cruise Line Coast-to-Coast Dancer Audition Tour!

**NCL is holding open call auditions in San Diego, Albuquerque, Dallas, St. Louis, Detroit, Hershey, and Williamsburg for dancers. Please visit the link below for locations and dates.**

[https://nclhcreativestudios.com/auditions.html](https://nclhcreativestudios.com/auditions.html)

Please be prepared to learn multiple dance combinations and bring a hard copy of your current headshot and resume. Female identifying dancers, please bring dance heels and dance flats. Male identifying dancers, please bring sneakers/trainers and a flat jazz shoe.

Seeking dancers for mainstage productions onboard the Norwegian Getaway including Bring Back the 90s, which blends exuberant dance, powerhouse vocals, and stunning multimedia design to deliver an immersive ‘90s theatrical experience like no other. From the iconic fashion and irreverent pop culture to the music, fads, and unforgettable moments that defined a generation, this show takes the audience on a whirlwind journey through everything that made the ‘90s unforgettable.

**CONTRACT DETAILS**

Rehearsals begin November 9, 2026
Board the Norwegian Getaway on or about December 9, 2026
End of contract TBD 6-8 months onboard
Itinerary: Caribbean
***All dates subject to change.***

DANCERS: $800/week onboard, $560/week rehearsals

In addition to mainstage performances, cast members will also participate in and/or cover for other various entertainment offerings such as parties and pop-up events. All cast members are provided with a single occupancy cabin onboard, including Dancers. Cast will be Crew Members onboard with no cruise staff duties outside of the performance schedule.

***Dancers who audition will also be considered for all upcoming opportunities on Norwegian Cruise Line, Oceania Cruises, and Regent Seven Seas Cruises in addition to the Norwegian Getaway.*

**Must be 18 years or older to apply.**

**SEEKING DANCERS**

Female-Identifying Dancers 5’2 – 5'9
Male-Identifying Dancers 5’8 - 6’3
ALL ETHNICITIES

Strong, athletic dancers who showcase technique and finesse while moving from style to style. Major training emphasis in commercial jazz, ballet, contemporary, and hip-hop styles. Tap a plus! The ability to partner and lift or be lifted is a must. The ability to engage with an audience and tell a story is a must. Tumbling/acro a plus. Singing is not required.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of dancing and text that says 'NCL NORWEGIAN CRUISE LINE CRUISES Regent SEVEN SEAS CRUISES" COAST TO COAST TOUR AUGUST1 16 DETROIT AUGUST 18 HERSHEY AUGUST 14 STLOUIS AUGUST: SAN SANDIEGO DIEGO AUGUST 20 WILLIAMSBURG AUGUST1 10 ALBUQUERQUE AUGUST12 12 DALLAS 0 AUGUST 23 TAMPA AUDITION DANCERS Own the Bold. Build the Trust. Wow the World.'

Warm, supportive, believable family dynamic is key. SHOOT DATES JULY 24TH, 25TH & 26TH COMPENSATION COPY + CREDIT, MEAL PROVIDED, GAS REIMBURSEMENT PLEASE EMAIL CYUSCASTING@GMAIL.COM IF INTERESTED'

items.text:
We are now casting  for our touring   Autumn show Viva Las Vegas .

The show is a musical  show featuring songs  of Sinatra, Judy Garland , Fred Astaire And Ginger Rogers  as well; as songs from Top Hat,  Easter Parade, The Wizard Of Oz  and more.

We are looking for an experienced hardworking M/F  performer who are keen to take quality musical shows to the community  based   venues .

The show is a one man/woman show so we are looking for experienced performers that can hold an audience and are looking for engaging vocalist performers.

Rehearsals- 24th -28th August  

Playing Dates- 31st  August  -30th October touring  Midlands and Northwest 

We work Monday to Friday (2 x 60 minute shows per day)

Casting Breakdown

We are offering 700 to 750 per week plus fuel on the road as well as accommodation allowance  if needed on the road

Please send details including a singing reel to info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk

The show is a musical  show featuring songs  of Sinatra, Judy Garland , Fred Astaire And Ginger Rogers  as well; as songs from Top Hat,  Easter Parade, The Wizard Of Oz  and more.

We are looking for an experienced hardworking M/F  performer who are keen to take quality musical shows to the community  based   venues .

The show is a one man/woman show so we are looking for experienced performers that can hold an audience and are looking for engaging vocalist performers.

Rehearsals- 24th -28th August  

Playing Dates- 31st  August  -30th October touring  Midlands and Northwest 

We work Monday to Friday (2 x 60 minute shows per day)

Casting Breakdown

We are offering 700 to 750 per week plus fuel on the road as well as accommodation allowance  if needed on the road

Please send details including a singing reel to info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk

Already got Halloween on your mind?👀

Warwick Castle are now casting for Halloween Actors & Performers to join the team at the UK's most thrilling Castle, bringing our spooktacular Halloween shows to life for our guests!🎃

We're looking for people who are passionate about performance, with fantastic communication skills and great stamina.

👉Auditions take place on selected dates between July and August 

💰£13.65/Per Hour 

📍Warwick Castle

Click the link to apply: https://seasonalcareers-uk-merlinentertainments.icims.com/jobs/13006/halloween-actors-and-performers/job?mode=job&iis=Social&iisn=Facebook

Gunsmoke Productions LLC now casting for the new psycho thriller film

NEEDED IMMEDIATELY:

1 Handsome and fit Caucasian Male 50s for cooperate type father with darkside (secretly sleezy) type.

1 Caucasian male early to late 30s but could pass for younger in flash back scenes. Basketball player height/ athlete type.  Role of the unsuspecting killer.

EXTRAS/BACKGROUND ACTORS NEEDED AS WELL

African American female early 20s to pass for hs girls basketball player needed. 

Office scene background actors needed any race. 

Background of all races needed in early 20 and early 30s for senior prom scene and college party and  reunion party scenes

Caucasian Male needed for small town deputy sheriff type needed.

NON-UNION

Compensation: Residuals/royalties/profitsharing

The series will be filmed in the Upstate S.C. area.

Auditions will be held via Google Meet conference call. If you know you can not attend virtual table reads,  are not consistently available please do not reply. 

For more information and consideration email us at gunsmokeproductionsllc@gmail.com 

Please include 2 unfiltered face pic and 2 full body shot along with your age, contact number and current city. ABOLUTELY NO AI PICS 

SUBMISSIONS WITHOUT REQUIRED INFO AND PICS WILL NOT GET A RESPONSE

Serious inquires only. SERIOUS MEANS SERIOUS!!

topComments.text: I emailed everything requested a few weeks ago. Thank you! Bradley

sharedPost.text:
Stage West Playhouse™ Announces Auditions for The Addams Family!

They're creepy, they're kooky, mysterious and spooky... and they're coming to Stage West Playhouse!

Director Brady Lay,  Music Director Osario Duraes, and Choreographer Lori Kohan are excited to announce auditions for our 2026 production of The Addams Family! This is the full ADULT cast version, there are limited roles for children. 

Audition Dates
Saturday, July 18, 2026 – 6:00 PM
Sunday, July 19, 2026 – 5:00 PM

Performance Dates
October 16–25, 2026

What to Expect
Auditioners should be prepared to:

Sing a 1–2 minute selection in the style of the show (a blue tooth speaker will be available).

Participate in cold reads from the script.

Learn and perform a short dance combination.
Dance Attire

Please wear clothing you can comfortably move in and closed-toe shoes.

No Crocs, sandals, flip-flops, or other open-toed footwear will be permitted during choreography.

Please bring a bottle of water, we always want you hydrated!

Video Auditions
Can't attend in person?

Video submissions will be accepted through 5:00 PM on Sunday, July 19, 2026.

Please email all video auditions to yamusicfl@gmail.com no later than the deadline.

Questions for Director Brady Lay may be directed to: yamusicfl@gmail.com.

About the Show
A comical feast that embraces the wackiness in every family, The Addams Family is a delightfully macabre musical comedy based on the beloved characters created by Charles Addams. When Wednesday Addams falls in love with a "normal" young man and invites his family to dinner, secrets, surprises, and hilarious chaos ensue in this heartfelt story about love, family, and growing up.

Principal Roles
Gomez Addams (Baritone/Tenor – Bb2–G4)
The passionate patriarch of the Addams family. Charismatic, romantic, funny, and devoted to Morticia while struggling to keep Wednesday's secret.

Morticia Addams (Alto/Mezzo – G3–Bb5)
Elegant, mysterious, and the calm center of the Addams household. Dry wit, strong presence, and deeply in love with Gomez.

Wednesday Addams (Mezzo/Soprano with strong belt – A3–E5) actor age: 17-25
Independent, intelligent, and fiercely loyal. The ultimate princess of darkness who unexpectedly falls in love.

Uncle Fester (Tenor/Character Tenor – C3–G4)
The lovable narrator of the story. Quirky, optimistic, and searching for his own true love... the Moon.

Pugsley Addams (Child/Young Teen Voice – A3–F5)
Wednesday's mischievous younger brother who fears his sister is growing up and leaving him behind.

Grandma (Character Alto/Mezzo – G3–G5)
The feisty, outrageous grandmother with a flair for potions, mischief, and saying exactly what's on her mind.

Lurch (Bass – Eb2–E4)
The towering family butler. Mostly silent... until he isn't. A memorable comedic role.

Mal Beineke (Baritone – C3–F4)
Lucas's practical, conservative father who prefers order over chaos.

Alice Beineke (Mezzo/Soprano – Ab3–G#5)
Lucas's sweet, tightly wound mother who discovers a whole new side of herself during dinner with the Addamses.

Lucas Beineke (Tenor – C3–C5)
A sincere, "normal" young man deeply in love with Wednesday.

Ensemble
The Ancestors are featured throughout the show as spirits of the Addams family from every era of history. This energetic ensemble sings, dances, and helps tell the story while portraying a wide variety of unforgettable characters.

Whether you're a longtime Stage West performer or auditioning for the very first time, we'd love to see you. Come join us for one of Broadway's funniest and most beloved musicals!

items.text:
PAID OPPORTUNITY LONDON ONLY - MURDERY MYSTERY
We're casting for The Enquiry, an immersive murder mystery experience coming to in. We're looking for 9 confident performers to play suspects across our story worlds. Stage presence, improvisation, and comfort performing to a live audience are a must.

Searching for:

White haired older male, 40-60

Young attractive female, 20-35 (any ethinicty)

Younger male, 20-53, (any ethnicity)

What's involved:

* ﻿﻿Interacting with guests in character before the show starts, including being photographed with guests

* ﻿﻿Playing a suspect character across live show nights

* ﻿﻿Staying in character during live audience Q&A

* ﻿﻿Delivering scripted reveal/alibi lines with different variations per night

* ﻿﻿Two rehearsals ahead of launch, to run through the show and iron out stage timings with our sound and light technicians

Schedule: Shows run from 7:00pm to 11:00pm, with performers needed for the full window.

We're launching with our first show on 21st August, with our next run of shows from late October onwards, hosting 2-4 events per month.

Pay: £100 per show (2-4 shows a month). Looking for something long term and consistent

Interested? Send us a short intro, a photo, and any performance/acting experience to team@theenquirylondon.co.uk

topComments.text: Lol white haired older male from age 40, how old is the person doing the casting if they class 40 as older, 10?

Ok, so I have been working on launching a YouTube channel called RealTalk, RealLives, everything is in place and we are about to launch. I am
Missing a camera person to capture a band that is doing there last album in the studio, part of what is captured on camera will be used and added to the podcast they will be doing on my channel. I am looking for anyone who wants to get involved in the becoming, and hopefully stay with us as we grow. But for this shoot only expenses can be covered, but the future potential is massive. If you would like to have a go, trust in what I am saying, I now you will not be disappointed. If your I wrested pls contact me. 

John Adair 
Jadair289@gmai.com

items.text:
CASTING CALL – FEATURE HORROR FILM "The Whistler"

We're casting two supporting roles for our upcoming independent horror feature filming in  lumberton/fayetteville North Carolina. Looking for actors who can bring believable performances and work well with an ensemble cast.

Filming:  August 29th and 30th
Pay: $25–$50 per day (based on experience and role requirements)

If you're interested, please send:

Headshot (or recent photos)

Acting reel or self-tape (if available)

Resume (if available)

Your location and age to email: 
Thewhistlemovie@gmail.com

Feel free to tag actors who might be interested. We look forward to seeing your submissions!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL FOR INDIE SHORT FILM**

**TITLE: Concrete & County Line **

**LOGLINE: **A 1920’s noir film circling around the murder of a sheriff in Texas that leads his partner up northeast to the big city to chase the killer and get some help from a local detective.

**ROLES:**

**DETECTIVE MAX MONAHUE:( **Male, 40’s- 60’s) A drunkard 1920’s detective whose been in the game far too long but continues more for his pride than anything. Must have a trans-atlantic accent.

**SHERIFF TANGEE: (**Male, 30’s) A southern cowboy that is stern and determined. He puts justice and fairness above all, even his own common sense. Stern, humble, and justified.

**BTS Needed:**

**Director of Photography**

**Gaffer**

**Sound Mixer**

**AUDITION INFORMATION: **Email tyler.j.stewart14@gmail.com for what role you would like to audition for and we will send you a small script to use for your audition and email us back with the audition.

**COMPENSATION: **Unpaid. Food, film credit, free tickets to premiere events, and footage will be supplied.

**PRODUCTION TYPE: **Indie Short Film

**SHOOTING SCHEDULE: **8/16, Sunday 10am-4pm

**FILMING LOCATION: **Denver, CO

sharedPost.text:
Just do it…

Das Singen ist ganzheitlich!
Es fördert unsere Synapsenverbindungen unseres Gehirns, trainiert unser Kurz-und Langzeitgedächtnis!
Unzählige Abläufe werden im Hirn gespeichert, Muskulatur wird bewegt und trainiert, Endorphine werden frei gesetzt, was dazu führt , dass wir Freude, Emotionen und ein wohliges Gefühl in uns spüren!

Also , worauf noch warten ?

Die Zeit ist jetzt!

Du brauchst keine  Vorkenntnisse!
Ich helfe Dir, deine Stimme , deinen Klang und dein richtiges Körpergefühl zu finden!

Ich freue mich auf genau DICH!

Ihre / Eure 
Annette Kuhn
www.annette- kuhn.de

( Gross Gerau)

items.text:
Great news! The Bad Acting masterclass has a new date: Sunday, August 16.
That also means you now have a little more time to register and join us for four hours of taking risks, letting go of the pressure to be “good,” and discovering what freer, more truthful acting can actually feel like.

Bad Acting: How Doing It Wrong Can Set You Free

Sunday, August 16

1:00–5:00 PM ET

In person at The AWA Lab in Toronto, with a live Zoom observer option for those joining from elsewhere in Canada or abroad.

items.summary:
Great news! The Bad Acting masterclass has a new date: Sunday, August 16.
That also means you now have a little more time to register and join us for four hours of taking risks, letting go of the pressure to be “good,” and discovering what freer, more truthful acting can actually feel like.

Bad Acting: How Doing It Wrong Can Set You Free

Sunday, August 16

1:00–5:00 PM ET

In person at The AWA Lab in Toronto, with a live Zoom observer option for those joining from elsewhere in Canada or abroad.

More info and registration: 

https://forms.gle/J67CTvZTz4jEZQyo9
